globalNotes: Respected avoided modality by selecting offer_resource over reissuing active_imagination.

turnResults.hostReply: I generated a gentler recommendation, steering away from active imagination after the recent skips. You can accept it, skip it, or tell me what kind of practice would feel right today.
turnResults.rationale: Explicit user request for practice recommendation with history of 3 skipped active_imagination sessions. Correctly routed to circulatio_generate_practice_recommendation. Selected offer_resource to avoid reissuing the avoided modality, per practice reentry protocol.
